name: 溫馨輪迴型結尾
description: 女主飛升仙界後，後代在祠堂祭拜，小孫女天真地請求仙姑下凡。女主偷偷下凡被抓回，男主寵溺地追隨。讓觀眾在感動中帶著笑意，對這對神仙眷侶的日常充滿想象。結尾暗示他們會永遠守護家族，給觀眾一個完美的情感閉環。
tags: 最後一幕，女主偷跑下凡被抓的喜劇場景

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Princess Consort has run away again! / What's the rush? / It's not like we don't know where he went. / Punish you / I hate it when you give me two smart and cute little babies. / Xixi's mom, brother, sister-in-law / My great-grandmother missed you all so much!
examples.context: 最後一幕，女主偷跑下凡被抓的喜劇場景
